Petition To Terminate Frederick Fitzgerald Trust And Waive Accounting
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Continued To Dec-14-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Terminate Frederick Fitzgerald Trust And Waive Accounting
Off Calendar Oct-26-2009 Continued To Nov-23-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alice Hofer for Rosemarie Huser.

Ms. Hofer stated that her Client went to storage, provided faxed copies of a 1997 certification of Smith and Barney, a 1997 tax certification and letter from the IRS, tax returns, a current bank statement, and that she had a declaration but that it had not been filed. The Court directed Ms. Hofer to file the documents and to obtain consents from the two Granddaughters. The matter was continued to November 23, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
